name: silent-auction-platform
description: Mobile-first silent auction single-page app for Ashleigh's fundraiser

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c green,cyan "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
